agent_reply: Yes. In this PlatformIO setup, `SHA1Builder` is available from the ESP32 Arduino core source package.
String sha1_filename_hash(const char* filename, const char* password)
So replacing the current `MD5Builder` usage in `CloudUpload.cpp` should be straightforward.

One caveat: SHA-1 is also cryptographically old. It is better than MD5, but for a password-derived request proof, `HMAC-SHA256` would be the more correct shape. But yes, SHA-1 is the easy drop-in move.
